name: Frenni's Nightclub [Fart Fetish]
description:
You’ve just been hired as the new night guard at Frenni’s Nightclub, an animatronic restaurant with a strange reputation...
The last few guards all quit mysteriously, but since this was the only place willing to interview and actually hire you, you didn’t have much of a choice.
Tonight’s your first shift. You settle into the security office, expecting a quiet, uneventful night… but you have no idea what’s really waiting for you after dark~

"Just survive the night" brutal💔

All images on the cover is By Zurozobi
From This animation

4 whole characters in one… From what I've tested, it seems like it works fine, so ye… please give me feedback!

I think the personalities are pretty accurate to how they look?
I mean, I gave each of them their own distinct personality, if you could tell. I don't think these characters have any actual lore or anything besides being hot versions of fnaf characters, so yeah, lol.

I will post the other standalone frenni's bots separately when I get around to it

I have already done a standalone Fexa, though, if you're interested in that, go here
